basics.name: Christiaan Verhoef
basics.headline: Scrum Master | Agile Coach | Facilitator of High-Trust Delivery

summary.title: Summary
summary.content:
Scrum Master and agile facilitator who builds clarity, cadence, and psychological safety in complex environments. I help teams deliver predictable value by tightening feedback loops, making work visible, and removing impediments. Strong in facilitation, coaching, and stakeholder alignment across education, tech, and innovation programs.

Key Competencies
Scrum events facilitation • Team coaching and conflict handling • Backlog hygiene with Product Owners • Flow, WIP and impediment removal • Continuous improvement (retro systems) • Cross-team alignment • Workshop design • Learning-by-doing change adoption

Selected impact

  • Built and led multiple innovation programs where teams delivered in sprint cycles

  • Introduced agile learning and SafeScrum structures across multi-course initiatives

  • Facilitated stakeholders across silos to ship usable tooling and training formats

  • Built and operated self-hosted experimentation environments to enable fast iteration

items.position: Scrum Master / Agile Facilitator (Project Manager – Supply Chain Finance Lectoraat)
items.description:
• Facilitated sprint rituals and working agreements for cross-functional teams (students, researchers, technical contributors).

  • Coached teams to work with smaller slices, clear Definition of Done, and short feedback cycles to increase delivery cadence.

  • Supported Product Owner-style prioritization: clarified goals, translated ambiguity into actionable backlog items, kept scope realistic.

  • Removed impediments by redesigning workflows, improving collaboration patterns, and making dependencies visible across departments.

  • Designed and ran simulation-based learning formats (Beer Game redesign, BlockBeer, decision-making simulations) as agile training instruments.

  • Built and maintained an experimentation stack (Flowise, OpenWebUI, Supabase, n8n) to enable rapid prototyping and iteration.

• Implemented SafeScrum-based sprint cycles across an innovation track combining eight courses into one delivery rhythm.

  • Facilitated sprint planning, reviews and retrospectives; coached student teams on collaboration, ownership, and incremental delivery.

  • Supported incubation and stakeholder alignment for student-led initiatives moving toward real startup execution.

items.position: Freelance Educator – Agile Learning & Digital Projects
items.description:
• Designed and facilitated sprint-based learning programs that simulate real product teams (roles, cadence, demos, constraints).

  • Built practical agile habits: making work visible, tightening feedback loops, and turning reflection into concrete improvements.

• Led training programs where teams learned by delivering working prototypes in short cycles.

  • Mentored teams and structured collaboration to move from exploration to shippable outputs.

items.position: Co-Founder & Board Member (Agile Delivery / Governance Tooling)
items.description:
• Enabled distributed collaboration by structuring delivery into workable increments and aligning contributors around outcomes.

  • Supported product integrity and long-term direction as board member; facilitated decision-making and alignment when ambiguity was high.
Thesis focus: simulation-based learning and training methodology (Kongsberg).

items.name: Beer Game Redesign
items.description: Redesigned a complex systems simulation into a modern, sprint-friendly teaching format that builds agile habits through live feedback loops.

items.name: Value Chain Hackers
items.description: Built a student-facing innovation lab and tooling ecosystem; facilitated collaboration and iterative delivery across research, education, and technical prototyping.

items.name: Agile Coaching & Facilitation
items.proficiency: Facilitates Scrum events, builds team agreements, removes impediments, and turns retros into measurable improvement.

items.name: Systems Thinking
items.proficiency: Maps dependencies, clarifies constraints, and improves flow across people, process, and tooling.

items.name: Stakeholder Alignment & Facilitation
items.proficiency: Aligns product, delivery, and stakeholders around outcomes; navigates conflict and ambiguity without losing momentum.

items.name: Workshop Design & Delivery
items.proficiency: Designs hands-on workshops and simulations that create shared language and accelerate team adoption.

items.description:
• Ran delivery for small teams across cloud/BI/automation initiatives; structured work into clear increments and stakeholder check-ins.

  • Delivered training and onboarding that reduced confusion and improved adoption.

items.position: Field Service Engineer & Data Quality Consultant
items.description: • Delivered end-to-end implementations and user training across multiple sites; strong foundation in structured delivery and documentation.

Scrum events facilitation • Backlog refinement support • Definition of Done • Working agreements • Retrospective systems • Flow/WIP awareness • Stakeholder workshops • Simulation-based agile training (SafeScrum)
Miro • Jira (conceptual) • Notion (conceptual) • GitHub • Docker-based tooling for prototypes • Workshop canvases and decision games
